textByHashes.cbb582e3cde0a1cb7138dac18aa3f25a29dc8709: I don't want to go back! That orc tried to kill me!
textByHashes.5334ca4ec0269def18a3d02fc936e25c21ad06bb: We must find a way to fight back! To throw those villains out of our homes.
textByHashes.aa00e9604e91e44b60159229480ac459d6a2118b: I can't believe that there are orcs in Zanaris.
textByHashes.cf425284e8dbc25024fc106e36aedfc4d6aa0a7d: Have you heard? The Godfather has allowed orcs into Zanaris!
textByHashes.77e3123aeb4514cd829f78af1f716a2a40b53464: Those fairies that side with the Godfather are all traitors! The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris!
textByHashes.8d794a6578116044a9d658f0d521aa09a92fc8c3: Have you seen Fairy Cake? She went to talk to the Godfather and I haven't seen her since.
textByHashes.42469960cb6db8c169dc01189a058caf1556249a: How is the Queen? Has she woken up yet?
textByHashes.91e64b3db27602154e71a67400df40fdb3cf462b: The Queen is the true ruler of Zanaris! We shall over- throw the tyrant!
textByHashes.23247f84497747856abcf3ec77d0270605bf9535: Once the council of war is finished we shall go and get rid of the Godfather.
textByHashes.cd39e5fac8322c05c834b9230c5147a16c591550: I'm so looking forward to going back home!
textByHashes.24fff5d98e58eee0817af421edcf44326edc86ee: Thank you for waking our queen.
textByHashes.f1b8d77d3eb3adc82d56449913dc691b05f82165: Now that the Queen is awake everything will be alright.
textByHashes.d9050b4109a85868245ec96acc9a432abe0b78ff: This fairy ring will take you out of Zanaris. It leads to the place known as Al-Kharid in your realm. Once passed you can not return this way.
textByHashes.a68ecebd4d779453a801cca0533a7cfcc3597b97: Before leaving make sure that you have fully sampled the delights of our marketplace.
textByHashes.25d164f21e924c7539d5bff3910bf434d0a57ff9: Have you got any idea where Burthorpe is? The co- ordinator says I need to go there and paint all the leaves yellow, but I've never heard of that place!
textByHashes.e328af6eda6cb49f539fb34934b3d05f546cd996: Be careful when you pick mushrooms near the strange ruins to the south. Some of them will try to eat you!
textByHashes.4de686919315e93fc1338b9648dcd53834a17e5e: Err, hello. Do you have any idea what a Winter Fairy actually does?
textByHashes.712d2667d7a52994f808568a5835d2ef6aca427a: Oh, pity. Neither do I, but I'm supposed to be one this week.
textByHashes.7c27cf8b2fa59e06f790cfc6cc58d3db6f0a1c78: Sorry, I can't talk I'm looking for Sarah-Jane!
textByHashes.f408c5118781e8deff3632c73fe1512b7d533ac2: Is your name Freddie, and are you loosing your teeth?
textByHashes.801ba7094571ba5ad9006e6912b2e23bf157e186: You don't have any idea where I can find him do you?
textByHashes.6776138a0ed7d76d8b19c8fe0be6183164ca785a: Oh, ok then. If you do find out please let me know. The co-ordinator has sent me to find him.
textByHashes.b7e07ff5d660615cb90eec1650e2f87d222a4f58: I'm afraid I can't stop to chat. I've just been told to get ready to go to Etceteria for some reason or other!
textByHashes.40a905b0e217b79c3101f5ff4b853069c2d1fc93: Picking mushrooms near the forge will probably end quite badly for you.
